title: Heita CAC/LTV by Acquisition Channel
description: Paid-CAC diligence dashboard. PostHog event data contract: acquisition channel comes from 'business_joined' (joinChannel, referralUsed) and 'membership.joined' (joinChannel, referralUsed, signupBonusPoints); customer value comes from 'points_earned' (points), 'points_redeemed' (points/rewardId), 'tier_upgraded' (previousTier, newTier), 'subscription_started' (plan, billingInterval), and 'subscription_upgraded' (previousPlan, newPlan, billingInterval). All events scoped by businessId. CAC numerator: ad spend from warehouse ad_spend table by joinChannel. LTV numerator: gross margin from billing + loyalty redemption value. Replace stub SQL panels with warehouse/PostHog queries when CAC spend import lands.

options.content: Stub for paid-CAC diligence dashboard. Join source comes from membership.joined joinChannel/referralUsed; value comes from loyalty.points_earned and loyalty.points_redeemed plus billing revenue. Replace text panels with warehouse/PostHog queries when CAC spend import lands.
